'''Reticul''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] of [[Hanoon]], which had been constructed<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> The city's inhabitants held a shard of an ancient [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]], the [[Vor'Na'Tu]]. The city, located next to one of the asteroid's [[Water/Legends|canals]], was comprised of a [[Command center]], several [[prefab shelter]]s, and an [[animal nursery]], the city was dominated by the Galactic Empire. Three [[Laser cannon/Legends|turrets]] encircled the town. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the future founder of the [[New Jedi Order]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and his sister [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] [[Battle of Hanoon|ventured]] to Hanoon to retrieve the shards, leading a small [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Army/Legends|army]].<ref name="SW:GB" />

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds}}
Skywalker and Organa went to Reticul first to recover the shard. The town was not willing to help unless the turrets were destroyed, so the Republic forces deployed their
[[Blaster Cannon]] to eliminate the turrets.<ref name="SW:GB" />
{{Endgame}}

Reticul then gratefully gave up their shard and provided three [[R2-D5]] [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droids]] so the Republic forces could establish a base and continue their mission. Later, Organa and Skywalker decided to free the rest of the asteroid and took control of the [[Terraform Processor]]. With the demise of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Yittreas]], Hanoon agreed to join the New Republic.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Reticul was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] to the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. It appeared during a [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia campaign mission. The mission's tasks may be completed in any order and in a variety of ways. This article assumes the player visited Reticul first, as it is the closest city and that the Blaster Cannon was employed against the turrets. The game's strategy guide recommends that strategy. The mission and thus Reticul was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
